name: anbima-data
description: ANBIMA skills for Brazilian investment funds. Thin routing layer over the Ayunit MCP (no bundled Python, no credentials, no .env). Data skills (anbima-funds-data, anbima-funds-historical-data) call the MCP cadastral/historical tools. Live-artifact skill (anbima-funds-explorer) emits a self-contained HTML dashboard that calls the MCP at runtime via Cowork's window.cowork.callMcpTool bridge — live/interactive in Cowork, layout-only in other surfaces.
